title: Croatian Creamy Pasta Bake
description: A simple, comforting pasta dish from Croatia, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This creamy pasta bake is a crowd-pleaser.
instructions: Cook the Croatian pasta according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the sour cream and stir until smooth.
Add the grated cheese and stir until melted and smooth.
Add cooked pasta to the saucepan and stir until well coated.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
